name: TheWorks.co.uk plc
summary: TheWorks.co.uk plc operates as a retailer of gifts, arts, crafts, toys, books, and stationery products in the United Kingdom and Ireland. The company sells its products through a network of stores, as well as through its online platform. As of April 26, 2020, the company operated 534 stores in the United Kingdom and Ireland. TheWorks.co.uk plc was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Birmingham, United Kingdom.
